name: Four Bricks Rook
description: Four-track trigger sequencer with 128-slot CV-addressable table memory, Length/Shift window, A/B buffers, Fill mode, quantize and randomizer. Unquantized recording for off-grid rhythms.

controls.name: Table Potentiometer
controls.description: Selects one of 8 tables currently addressed. Combined with Table CV, maps across the 128-pattern memory via 16 loadable slots.
controls.detail: 8 patterns per slot · 16 slots × 8 = 128 patterns in non-volatile memory

controls.name: Length Potentiometer
controls.description: Sets playback length: 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 8, 12, 16, 24, or 32 steps. Bipolar CV input is additive.

controls.name: Shift Potentiometer
controls.description: Selects which segment of a recorded 32-step sequence plays at shorter Length. Divides 32 into length-size chunks.
controls.detail: At L=8 with 32-step recording: 4 segments · Shift CV selects between them on the fly

controls.name: Menu Potentiometer
controls.scope: Load / Save / Trigger length / Random amount
controls.description: Scrolls the menu display during Load Pattern, Save Table, Load Fill, trigger length edit, and random-amount edit.
controls.detail: Paired with display · double-click Function to edit per-track trigger length

controls.name: Pads (4)
controls.description: Play triggers in Play mode, audition patterns in Pattern mode, gate fills in Fill mode, mute tracks in Mute mode.
controls.detail: Function+Pad selects mode · inverted LED indicates pattern playback overriding buffer

controls.name: Function Button
controls.description: Shift key combining with other buttons: Function+Pad = mode select, Function+Rec = Load Pattern, Function+Erase = Save Table, Function+A/B = Load Fill.
controls.detail: Double-click = per-track trigger length edit · combined with Quantize = random-amount edit

controls.name: Rec Button
controls.description: Arms recording. Pad triggers are captured into the current buffer. Hold 5 seconds to store full module state to non-volatile memory.
controls.detail: Unquantized by default · Quantize button aligns to clock after the fact

controls.name: Erase Button
controls.description: Erases the current buffer content on the pressed pad. Combined with Function = Save Table.
controls.detail: Per-track operation · select track by pressing its pad during Erase

controls.name: A/B Button
controls.description: Switches between two recording buffers, like two sides of a tape. Function+A/B = Load Fill.

controls.name: Quantize Button
controls.description: Quantizes a recorded track to the incoming clock. Press Quantize then the target pad.
controls.detail: After-the-fact quantize · leaves other tracks unquantized

inputs.name: Fill All
inputs.description: Gate input triggering all four tracks to play their Fill patterns for the gate duration.

inputs.name: Shift CV
inputs.description: Bipolar CV selecting playback segment within the 32-step buffer when Length < 32.

inputs.name: Length CV
inputs.description: Bipolar CV offset added to the Length potentiometer value.

inputs.name: Table CV
inputs.description: CV addressing the currently loaded 8-pattern table and spanning into adjacent slots.

outputs.name: Out 1
outputs.description: Track 1 trigger output. Default trigger length 4 ms; per-track adjustable up to clock period.

behaviors.name: Play Mode
behaviors.description: Pads act as manual triggers. With Rec armed, pad presses are captured into the buffer at their literal timing (unquantized) unless Quantize is applied later.

behaviors.name: Pattern Mode
behaviors.description: Pressing a pad swaps its track output from the buffer to the table pattern addressed by Table pot/CV. LED inverts to show pattern is active. Press again to return to buffer.

behaviors.name: Fill Mode
behaviors.trigger: Function + Pad 3 (Fill) or Fill All gate
behaviors.description: Table patterns play only while pad is held (or for the Fill All gate duration). Enables live on-the-fly fills. Fill slot independently assignable via Load Fill.

behaviors.name: Mute Mode
behaviors.description: Pad presses mute their track. Muted tracks show slow-pulsing status LED. While Rec is engaged, Mute additionally erases recorded steps within the mute window.

behaviors.name: Length & Shift Slicing
behaviors.trigger: Length < buffer length with Shift CV
behaviors.description: Short Length plus CV-addressed Shift turns the 32-step buffer into addressable slices. Resembles a slice function on a sampler — mangles Amen-break-style recorded tables into junglist variations.

behaviors.name: Per-Track Random Fills
behaviors.description: Each track has its own random amount 0-9. Algorithm concentrates random hits toward the end of the sequence (drum-fill style). Full F value is pure random triggers.

behaviors.name: Non-Volatile State Storage
behaviors.description: Stores buffers, trigger lengths, random amounts, and pointed slots to flash. Powers up in the same state next session.

patchIdeas.name: Quad drum voice sequencer
patchIdeas.patch: 4 pads → 4 drum voices · Table pot walks preset banks (Shakmat Basics / Richard Devine / Konstantine Funky etc.) · Fill All gate from performance button triggers breakdowns
patchIdeas.diagram:
FOUR BRICKS ROOK:
* Table slot: 1 Richard Devine's Beats
- Clock (Out) c> Four Bricks Rook (Clock)
- Performer (Gate) g> Four Bricks Rook (Fill All)
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 1) t> Kick (Trig)
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 2) t> Snare (Trig)
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 3) t> Hat (Trig)
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 4) t> Perc (Trig)

patchIdeas.name: Unquantized hand-played groove
patchIdeas.patch: Rec armed · tap 4 pads like a finger drummer · module captures literal timing for off-grid swing · quantize only kick + snare, leave hats untouched for human feel
patchIdeas.diagram:
FOUR BRICKS ROOK:
* Rec: armed · Quantize: tracks 1+2 only
- Clock (Out) c> Four Bricks Rook (Clock)
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 1) t> Kick (Trig) // quantized
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 2) t> Snare (Trig) // quantized
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 3) t> Hat (Trig) // off-grid
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 4) t> Perc (Trig) // off-grid

patchIdeas.name: Amen-break slice mangler
patchIdeas.patch: Record 32-step Amen pattern · Length=4 slices it into 8 segments · random LFO → Shift CV scrambles segment order each bar · Table CV selects alternative tables on top
patchIdeas.diagram:
FOUR BRICKS ROOK:
* L=4 · 32-step recording
- Clock (Out) c> Four Bricks Rook (Clock)
- S&H (Out) >> Four Bricks Rook (Shift CV)
- LFO (Out) >> Four Bricks Rook (Table CV)
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 1) t> Drum A (Trig)
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 2) t> Drum B (Trig)
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 3) t> Drum C (Trig)
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 4) t> Drum D (Trig)

patchIdeas.name: A/B verse/chorus switch
patchIdeas.patch: Bank A = verse groove · Bank B = chorus groove · performer toggles A/B at bar · identical trigger voices · identical table so Pattern mode can overlay fills on either
patchIdeas.diagram:
FOUR BRICKS ROOK:
* Bank A: verse · Bank B: chorus
- Clock (Out) c> Four Bricks Rook (Clock)
- Bar Clock (Out) t> Four Bricks Rook (Reset)
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 1) t> Kick (Trig)
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 2) t> Snare (Trig)
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 3) t> Hat (Trig)
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 4) t> Tom (Trig)

patchIdeas.name: Gate-from-trigger hack
patchIdeas.patch: Per-track trigger length set to clock period · clock doubler on Clock input · Out 1 becomes a gate the length of one clock-period while original division halves tempo, enabling gate sequencing from a trigger sequencer
patchIdeas.diagram:
FOUR BRICKS ROOK:
* Track 1 trig length: clock period
- Clock (Out) -> Clock Multiplier (x2)
- Clock Multiplier (Out) c> Four Bricks Rook (Clock)
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 1) g> VCA (Gate) // sustained gate
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 2) t> Drum (Trig)

patchIdeas.name: Randomizer fills with probability
patchIdeas.patch: Per-track random amount: Track1=0 (no random), Track2=3 (light), Track3=6 (medium), Track4=9 (chaos) · random hits pile near sequence end for natural drum fills · Reset from bar clock resets the build-up
patchIdeas.diagram:
FOUR BRICKS ROOK:
* Rand A: 0/3/6/9 per track
- Clock (Out) c> Four Bricks Rook (Clock)
- Bar Clock (Out) t> Four Bricks Rook (Reset)
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 1) t> Kick (Trig) // solid
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 2) t> Snare (Trig) // occasional
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 3) t> Hat (Trig) // busy
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 4) t> Ride (Trig) // chaotic

patchIdeas.name: CV-addressed song mode
patchIdeas.patch: Slow staircase CV into Table CV walks through 16 slots as song sections · Length held at 16 · each slot pre-filled with a different bar · simple LFO or sequencer becomes a song-mode driver
patchIdeas.diagram:
FOUR BRICKS ROOK:
* 16 slots = 16 bars of song
- Clock (Out) c> Four Bricks Rook (Clock)
- Slow Staircase (Out) >> Four Bricks Rook (Table CV)
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 1) t> Kick (Trig)
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 2) t> Snare (Trig)
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 3) t> Hat (Trig)
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 4) t> Perc (Trig)

patchIdeas.name: Live fill performance
patchIdeas.patch: Play mode on pads 1-3 plays the buffer · pad 4 in Fill mode holds a loaded fill table · tap-and-hold pad 4 for momentary fills without re-patching · Fill All gate triggers full-kit breakdowns
patchIdeas.diagram:
FOUR BRICKS ROOK:
* Pad 4: Fill mode · Load Fill: slot 9 Euclidean Combos
- Clock (Out) c> Four Bricks Rook (Clock)
- Performer (Gate) g> Four Bricks Rook (Fill All)
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 1) t> Kick (Trig)
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 2) t> Snare (Trig)
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 3) t> Hat (Trig)
- Four Bricks Rook (Out 4) t> Fill Drum (Trig)
